title: scutellaria incana
intro: Scutellaria incana, also known as woolly skullcap, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Scutellaria incana include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Scutellaria incana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its effects.
